items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.content: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
items.contentSnippet: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

summaries.zh: OpenAI的数据显示，ChatGPT的全球采用率正在增长。用户增加使用量，探索更多功能，推动各地区和语言的普及。
summaries.en: OpenAI's new Signals data reveals ChatGPT adoption is expanding globally. Users are increasing their usage and exploring more features, driving growth across regions and languages. The trend indicates rising engagement and broader adoption of the platform.

items.summary: OpenAI的数据显示，ChatGPT的全球采用率正在增长。用户增加使用量，探索更多功能，推动各地区和语言的普及。

items.title: Inside Genebench-Pro

summaries.zh: 由于未提供具体文章内容，无法生成准确摘要。请提供文章标题和内容以便进行总结。
summaries.en:
**Summary:**  

"Inside Genebench-Pro" explores the features and functionality of Genebench-Pro, a software tool designed for genetic data analysis. The article highlights its user-friendly interface, advanced algorithms for sequence alignment and variant detection, and integration with popular genomic databases. It also mentions support for various file formats and customization options to suit different research needs. The content emphasizes Genebench-Pro's efficiency in processing large datasets and its role in streamlining genetic research workflows. The article concludes by noting its popularity among biologists for its reliability and comprehensive analysis capabilities.

items.summary: 由于未提供具体文章内容，无法生成准确摘要。请提供文章标题和内容以便进行总结。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.content: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

summaries.zh: GeneBench-Pro 是一款用于基因组学、生物学和科研领域的新的人工智能性能基准测试工具。它采用复杂的真实世界数据集进行测试，旨在评估 AI 在相关领域的表现。
summaries.en: GeneBench-Pro is a new AI benchmark tool designed to evaluate performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research. It utilizes complex, real-world datasets for testing.

items.summary: GeneBench-Pro 是一款用于基因组学、生物学和科研领域的新的人工智能性能基准测试工具。它采用复杂的真实世界数据集进行测试，旨在评估 AI 在相关领域的表现。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.content: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

summaries.zh: OpenAI工程师通过大规模核心转储分析，解决了罕见的系统崩溃问题。他们发现存在硬件故障和18年的老软件缺陷。
summaries.en: OpenAI engineers analyzed large-scale core dumps to debug rare infrastructure crashes, identifying both a hardware fault and an 18-year-old software bug. The findings revealed a persistent issue affecting system stability.

items.summary: OpenAI工程师通过大规模核心转储分析，解决了罕见的系统崩溃问题。他们发现存在硬件故障和18年的老软件缺陷。

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.content: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
items.contentSnippet: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

summaries.zh: 《OpenAI报告：欧洲AI劳动力机遇地图》显示，AI可能重塑欧盟各行业就业岗位，指出哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。报告通过数据映射，为欧盟应对AI带来的就业转型提供参考。
summaries.en: The OpenAI report maps AI's potential impact on EU jobs, identifying occupations at risk of automation, growth, or workflow changes. The analysis highlights key workforce shifts across Europe, offering insights into how AI could reshape employment landscapes.

items.summary: 《OpenAI报告：欧洲AI劳动力机遇地图》显示，AI可能重塑欧盟各行业就业岗位，指出哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。报告通过数据映射，为欧盟应对AI带来的就业转型提供参考。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.content: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.contentSnippet: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

summaries.zh: 惠普公司（HP Inc.）宣布扩大与OpenAI的战略合作，将人工智能技术应用于客户体验、软件开发及企业运营等领域。此次合作旨在推动AI技术的广泛应用，提升各业务环节的智能化水平。
summaries.en: HP Inc. has expanded its strategic partnership with OpenAI to deploy artificial intelligence across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations. The collaboration aims to integrate OpenAI's advanced AI technologies into HP's offerings, enhancing various business functions. The partnership marks a significant step in leveraging AI for innovation and efficiency.

items.summary: 惠普公司（HP Inc.）宣布扩大与OpenAI的战略合作，将人工智能技术应用于客户体验、软件开发及企业运营等领域。此次合作旨在推动AI技术的广泛应用，提升各业务环节的智能化水平。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.content: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

summaries.zh: OpenAI展示了新一代模型GPT-5.6 Sol，该模型在编程、科学和网络安全方面具备更强能力，并配备了其最先进的安全系统。
summaries.en: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation AI model featuring enhanced coding, science, and cybersecurity capabilities. The model is integrated with OpenAI's most advanced safety stack.

items.summary: OpenAI展示了新一代模型GPT-5.6 Sol，该模型在编程、科学和网络安全方面具备更强能力，并配备了其最先进的安全系统。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.content: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.contentSnippet: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

summaries.zh: 新发布的OpenAI研究报告显示，AI代理正在改变工作方式，使更长时间、更复杂的任务成为可能，并提升各岗位的生产力。
summaries.en: A new OpenAI research paper reveals that AI agents are transforming work by enabling longer, more complex tasks and boosting productivity across various roles. The findings highlight the growing impact of AI agents in enhancing job capabilities and efficiency.

items.summary: 新发布的OpenAI研究报告显示，AI代理正在改变工作方式，使更长时间、更复杂的任务成为可能，并提升各岗位的生产力。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.content: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

summaries.zh: OpenAI与Broadcom联合推出Jalapeño芯片，专为大型语言模型（LLM）推理优化，旨在提升性能、效率及AI系统的规模化应用。该芯片通过定制化设计，有效支持LLM的高效运行。
summaries.en: OpenAI and Broadcom have launched the Jalapeño, a custom AI chip optimized for large language model (LLM) inference. The chip aims to enhance performance, efficiency, and scalability in AI systems.

items.summary: OpenAI与Broadcom联合推出Jalapeño芯片，专为大型语言模型（LLM）推理优化，旨在提升性能、效率及AI系统的规模化应用。该芯片通过定制化设计，有效支持LLM的高效运行。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.content: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

summaries.zh: OpenAI通过Appia基金会，支持建立高级人工智能的共享标准，包括评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。
summaries.en: OpenAI collaborates with the Appia Foundation to establish shared standards for advanced AI. The partnership focuses on developing evaluation frameworks, implementing safety practices, and fostering global cooperation to ensure responsible AI advancement.

items.summary: OpenAI通过Appia基金会，支持建立高级人工智能的共享标准，包括评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.content: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.contentSnippet: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

summaries.zh: GPT-5 Pro助力免疫学家Derya Unutmaz解决了长达三年的免疫学谜题，揭示了T细胞行为的新见解。这一突破可能有助于癌症和自身免疫性疾病的研究。
summaries.en: GPT-5 Pro assisted immunologist Derya Unutmaz in resolving a three-year-old immunology mystery by providing insights into T cell behavior. This breakthrough may advance research in cancer and autoimmune diseases.

items.summary: GPT-5 Pro助力免疫学家Derya Unutmaz解决了长达三年的免疫学谜题，揭示了T细胞行为的新见解。这一突破可能有助于癌症和自身免疫性疾病的研究。

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.content: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
items.contentSnippet: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

summaries.zh: Omio利用OpenAI技术，打造智能对话式旅行体验，加速产品开发，转型为AI原生企业。通过AI赋能，Omio提升旅行服务效率，优化用户体验，推动行业智能化发展。
summaries.en: Omio leverages OpenAI to enhance conversational travel experiences, speed up product development, and evolve into an AI-driven company. The integration of OpenAI's technology aims to improve user interactions and streamline operations, positioning Omio as a leader in AI-powered travel solutions.

items.summary: Omio利用OpenAI技术，打造智能对话式旅行体验，加速产品开发，转型为AI原生企业。通过AI赋能，Omio提升旅行服务效率，优化用户体验，推动行业智能化发展。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.content: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

summaries.zh: "补丁星球"是Daybreak发起的一项倡议，旨在通过人工智能和专家审核，帮助开源维护者发现、验证和修复漏洞。该计划为开源社区提供技术支持，提升代码安全性。
summaries.en: "Patch the Planet" is a Daybreak initiative aimed at supporting open-source maintainers. The program uses AI and expert review to help them identify, validate, and fix vulnerabilities in open-source software. This initiative streamlines the process of addressing security issues, making it more efficient for maintainers to enhance the safety and reliability of open-source projects.

items.summary: "补丁星球"是Daybreak发起的一项倡议，旨在通过人工智能和专家审核，帮助开源维护者发现、验证和修复漏洞。该计划为开源社区提供技术支持，提升代码安全性。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.content: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

summaries.zh: OpenAI推出Daybreak新工具，包括Codex Security和GPT-5.5-Cyber，旨在帮助组织大规模发现、验证和修复漏洞。这些工具提升了网络安全防护能力，支持企业全面保障信息安全。
summaries.en: OpenAI has launched Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to assist organizations in identifying, validating, and patching vulnerabilities at scale. These tools aim to enhance cybersecurity by streamlining the process of securing systems globally.

items.summary: OpenAI推出Daybreak新工具，包括Codex Security和GPT-5.5-Cyber，旨在帮助组织大规模发现、验证和修复漏洞。这些工具提升了网络安全防护能力，支持企业全面保障信息安全。

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.content: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.

summaries.zh: 《Codex-maxxing用于长期工作》介绍了Jason Liu如何使用Codex保存上下文、管理复杂项目，并使工作在单个提示之外继续进行。该方法通过有效利用Codex的功能，确保项目连续性和信息完整性。
summaries.en: Jason Liu employs Codex to maintain context, manage complex projects, and ensure continuity in long-running work beyond individual prompts. The method helps preserve project details and facilitates ongoing tasks efficiently.

items.summary: 《Codex-maxxing用于长期工作》介绍了Jason Liu如何使用Codex保存上下文、管理复杂项目，并使工作在单个提示之外继续进行。该方法通过有效利用Codex的功能，确保项目连续性和信息完整性。

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.content: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.contentSnippet: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

summaries.zh: 三星电子向全球员工部署了ChatGPT企业版和Codex，这是OpenAI最大规模的企业AI推广之一。此举旨在提升员工工作效率，通过AI工具辅助日常任务。
summaries.en: Samsung Electronics has rolled out OpenAI's ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to its employees globally. This represents one of the largest enterprise AI deployments by OpenAI, enhancing Samsung's internal AI capabilities.

items.summary: 三星电子向全球员工部署了ChatGPT企业版和Codex，这是OpenAI最大规模的企业AI推广之一。此举旨在提升员工工作效率，通过AI工具辅助日常任务。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.content: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

summaries.zh: OpenAI为ChatGPT Enterprise推出新的使用分析功能和费用控制更新，旨在帮助企业有效管理成本，在AI应用中实现规模化扩展。
summaries.en: OpenAI has launched updated spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise. These features enable organizations to manage costs more effectively and scale AI deployment with greater confidence. The enhancements provide better insights into usage patterns, allowing businesses to optimize their AI investments.

items.summary: OpenAI为ChatGPT Enterprise推出新的使用分析功能和费用控制更新，旨在帮助企业有效管理成本，在AI应用中实现规模化扩展。

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.content: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

summaries.zh: GPT-5.5 Instant通过增强推理能力、优化上下文理解、改善沟通清晰度以及引入医师专业评估，提升了ChatGPT在健康领域的智能水平。这些改进使ChatGPT能提供更准确、更有条理的健康信息。
summaries.en: GPT-5.5 Instant enhances ChatGPT's health intelligence by improving reasoning, context, communication, and incorporating physician-informed evaluations. The update aims to provide more accurate and reliable wellness responses.

items.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant通过增强推理能力、优化上下文理解、改善沟通清晰度以及引入医师专业评估，提升了ChatGPT在健康领域的智能水平。这些改进使ChatGPT能提供更准确、更有条理的健康信息。

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.content: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
items.contentSnippet: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

summaries.zh: 研究人员利用OpenAI推理模型协助诊断罕见遗传疾病，在未解决的病例中发现了18例新诊断。该技术提高了诊断效率，为儿童罕见病诊断提供了新方法。
summaries.en: Researchers employed an OpenAI reasoning model to assist in diagnosing rare genetic diseases in children, successfully identifying 18 new cases in previously unresolved cases. The study highlights the potential of AI in improving diagnostic accuracy for rare conditions.

items.summary: 研究人员利用OpenAI推理模型协助诊断罕见遗传疾病，在未解决的病例中发现了18例新诊断。该技术提高了诊断效率，为儿童罕见病诊断提供了新方法。

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.content: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

summaries.zh: OpenAI与Molecule.one展示了一种近乎自主的AI化学家如何利用GPT-5.4改进了药物合成中的关键反应，推动了药物化学研究的发展。该AI通过优化反应条件，显著提升了效率，为复杂药物分子的合成提供了新方法。
summaries.en: A near-autonomous AI chemist, developed by OpenAI and Molecule.one using GPT-5.4, has enhanced a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry. The AI demonstrated improved efficiency in drug synthesis, advancing research in the field.

items.summary: OpenAI与Molecule.one展示了一种近乎自主的AI化学家如何利用GPT-5.4改进了药物合成中的关键反应，推动了药物化学研究的发展。该AI通过优化反应条件，显著提升了效率，为复杂药物分子的合成提供了新方法。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.content: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

summaries.zh: 生命科学基准 LifeSciBench 是一个由专家撰写和评审的基准，用于评估 AI 系统在处理真实世界生命科学研究任务和决策方面的表现。该基准旨在提供权威的评估工具，帮助衡量 AI 在生命科学领域的实际应用能力。
summaries.en: LifeSciBench is an expert-authored and expert-reviewed benchmark designed to evaluate AI systems' performance in handling real-world life science research tasks and decisions. It provides a standardized tool for assessing AI capabilities in this field.

items.summary: 生命科学基准 LifeSciBench 是一个由专家撰写和评审的基准，用于评估 AI 系统在处理真实世界生命科学研究任务和决策方面的表现。该基准旨在提供权威的评估工具，帮助衡量 AI 在生命科学领域的实际应用能力。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.content: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

summaries.zh: OpenAI推出部署模拟技术，通过使用真实对话数据模拟AI模型部署，预测其发布前的行为表现，以提升安全性和评估准确性。该技术旨在提前识别潜在风险，确保模型在实际应用中的稳定性和可靠性。
summaries.en: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before release. The approach uses real conversation data to enhance safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.summary: OpenAI推出部署模拟技术，通过使用真实对话数据模拟AI模型部署，预测其发布前的行为表现，以提升安全性和评估准确性。该技术旨在提前识别潜在风险，确保模型在实际应用中的稳定性和可靠性。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.content: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

summaries.zh: OpenAI推出合作伙伴网络，投资1.5亿美元，旨在帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。该网络将提供资金和技术支持，推动企业AI应用落地。
summaries.en: OpenAI introduces the Partner Network, investing $150 million to support global partners in accelerating enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation. The initiative aims to enhance widespread implementation of AI technologies.

items.summary: OpenAI推出合作伙伴网络，投资1.5亿美元，旨在帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。该网络将提供资金和技术支持，推动企业AI应用落地。

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.content: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

summaries.zh: OpenAI推出三门学院课程，旨在帮助人们掌握实用AI技能，创建可重复的工作流程，并在日常工作中应用AI代理。这些课程将助力应对下一阶段的工作需求。
summaries.en: OpenAI has launched three new Academy courses designed to equip individuals with practical AI skills. The courses focus on creating repeatable workflows and applying AI agents in daily work settings, preparing people for the next era of work.

items.summary: OpenAI推出三门学院课程，旨在帮助人们掌握实用AI技能，创建可重复的工作流程，并在日常工作中应用AI代理。这些课程将助力应对下一阶段的工作需求。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.content: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.contentSnippet: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.

summaries.zh: Preply结合AI和人工导师进行个性化学习。该平台利用OpenAI生成AI课程总结，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习，以提升学习效果。
summaries.en: Preply integrates AI and human tutors to personalize language learning. It utilizes OpenAI to generate AI-based lesson summaries, offering tailored feedback and customized exercises. This approach combines technological efficiency with human expertise to enhance the learning experience.

items.summary: Preply结合AI和人工导师进行个性化学习。该平台利用OpenAI生成AI课程总结，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习，以提升学习效果。

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.content: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.contentSnippet: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

summaries.zh: 天体物理学家陈启宽利用Codex构建黑洞模拟，以帮助科学家研究极端物理现象并检验爱因斯坦的广义相对论。这一技术通过模拟黑洞的复杂行为，为研究宇宙深处的物理规律提供了重要工具。
summaries.en: An astrophysicist, Chi-kwan Chan, employs Codex to construct black hole simulations. These simulations assist scientists in studying extreme physics and testing Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

items.summary: 天体物理学家陈启宽利用Codex构建黑洞模拟，以帮助科学家研究极端物理现象并检验爱因斯坦的广义相对论。这一技术通过模拟黑洞的复杂行为，为研究宇宙深处的物理规律提供了重要工具。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.content: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

summaries.zh: OpenAI计划收购Ona公司，以扩展Codex平台，通过构建安全的持久云环境，支持跨企业工作流程的长期AI代理运行。此次收购旨在提升AI技术的应用范围和稳定性。
summaries.en: OpenAI is acquiring Ona to enhance its Codex platform. The acquisition aims to integrate secure, persistent cloud environments, allowing long-running AI agents to operate within enterprise workflows. This move expands Codex's capabilities, supporting more complex and sustained AI applications in business settings.

items.summary: OpenAI计划收购Ona公司，以扩展Codex平台，通过构建安全的持久云环境，支持跨企业工作流程的长期AI代理运行。此次收购旨在提升AI技术的应用范围和稳定性。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.content: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

summaries.zh: 西班牙银行BBVA已将人工智能（AI）作为核心，通过OpenAI扩展ChatGPT企业版服务至10万名员工。BBVA与OpenAI合作，旨在加速全球银行业AI转型。
summaries.en: BBVA has scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to serve 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to integrate AI into banking operations. The collaboration aims to accelerate AI-powered transformation globally.

items.summary: 西班牙银行BBVA已将人工智能（AI）作为核心，通过OpenAI扩展ChatGPT企业版服务至10万名员工。BBVA与OpenAI合作，旨在加速全球银行业AI转型。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.content: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

summaries.zh: OpenAI支持欧盟AI内容透明度准则，推动溯源标准和工具的发展，以帮助人们理解AI生成内容，助力构建可信AI生态。
summaries.en: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, focusing on advancing provenance standards and tools to help people identify AI-generated content. The initiative aims to build a trustworthy AI ecosystem by ensuring greater clarity and transparency in AI applications.

items.summary: OpenAI支持欧盟AI内容透明度准则，推动溯源标准和工具的发展，以帮助人们理解AI生成内容，助力构建可信AI生态。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.content: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.contentSnippet: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

summaries.zh: 通过Oracle云，企业可利用现有承诺访问OpenAI模型和Codex，以企业级安全与治理能力构建和部署AI。
summaries.en: Access OpenAI models and Codex via Oracle Cloud using existing commitments. This allows enterprise-grade AI development and deployment with integrated security and governance. The service leverages Oracle Cloud infrastructure to facilitate building and deploying AI solutions.

items.summary: 通过Oracle云，企业可利用现有承诺访问OpenAI模型和Codex，以企业级安全与治理能力构建和部署AI。
